creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
www/chromium fails with almost the same error

[ 99% 62300/62307] python3 ../../build/gn_run_binary.py ./v8_context_snapshot_generator --output_file=v8_context_snapshot.bin
FAILED: v8_context_snapshot.bin 
python3 ../../build/gn_run_binary.py ./v8_context_snapshot_generator --output_file=v8_context_snapshot.bin
./v8_context_snapshot_generator failed with exit code -5

Any clues on what could be the culprit ?
